Requirements:
- Use YAML header:
  ---
  applyTo: "**/*.tsx,**/*.ts,**/*.css"
  ---
- Define UI/UX principles for this project.
- Cover layout consistency, spacing system, typography hierarchy, color usage, accessibility, and component consistency.
- Emphasize clarity, simplicity, and usability.
- Keep it framework-agnostic (design rules, not Tailwind utilities).
- Structured, concise, and professional.
